programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: When Poof has trouble falling asleep, Wanda tries to help by reading him a book of classic fairy tales.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy and his fairies must save the city when Foop decides to make all of Dimmsdale unhappy by replacing everyone's pets with evil pets.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy finds out that he has to share his fairies with the new girl in school, Chloe Carmichael, but when Chloe realizes she can use her magic for good, she wishes everyone in Dimmsdale would share everything, and chaos ensues.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: When Catman thinks Timmy has been kidnapped, he mistakes Chloe for Catgirl and enlists her help to save Timmy; when Timmy wishes that his father could be Mayor, he ends up getting tortured by the paparazzi and risks having his fairies discovered.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Chloe joins the Squirrely Scouts and saves the troop by helping them get their first merit badge; when Timmy and Chloe find out they have the same birthday, they decide to compete for the best party.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Chloe's favorite cartoon characters come to life and brainwash Timmy and Wanda; Timmy's enemies learn that he is helpless without his fairies and try to destroy him while he is weak.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Chloe thinks she has a rash caused by stress and wishes to be a slacker, but Dimmsdale falls apart without her; Dad wants to catch a fish to win a trophy, but Chloe wishes all the fish could fight back.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Chloe wishes that an animal resembling Mr. Crocker would no longer be endangered; Timmy, Chloe and the fairies go inside Mr. Crocker to destroy Fairy Flu germs.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe must come to the rescue when Chloe's parents decide to return Cosmo and Wanda, who disguised themselves as birds, to their natural habitat.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: When Chloe's goodness threatens to drain the Anti-Fairy World Wand, Foop disguises himself as a girl in order to break Chloe; Timmy takes Chloe to meet Mark Chang so he can prove that aliens really do exist.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: After Timmy and Chloe save Dark Laser's beloved pet, Dark Laser becomes bound to them as their bodyguard; Timmy and Chloe wish up a girlfriend for Mr. Crocker to get him off their backs.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: When Cosmo loses the wands after Timmy and Chloe switch places, they risk being stuck as each other; Timmy and his father have some time to bond when they enter a film festival, but things get out of hand when Dad casts Catman.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Mr. Crocker creates Wonky Cosmo and Wanda clones to get into a Fairy Convention to steal all the fairies' magic; Timmy wishes Chloe could live out her favorite dystopian movie but quickly regrets it when everyone is hungry.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe wish that their families go camping together, but there is a feud between their parents. Chloe wishes to be a mother so she can go to Dimmsdale Daze Carnival with Timmy.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe help the depressed Catman prove to his girlfriend that he is a real superhero; Mr. Crocker teaches his nephew Kevin Crocker how to become a Fairy Hunter.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The Squirrely Scouts go into space to plant a flag on unfamiliar terrain, hoping to achieve a special Squirrely Scout status; Chloe spends the summer vacation studying, but her inner child disagrees and causes her to make crazy wishes in her sleep.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Despite Timmy's warnings, Chloe wants to free the supposedly dangerous class hare; when Timmy's Dad buys the last Kale Patch Kid she needs to complete her collection, Chloe considers stealing it.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Mom and Dad want to renew their marriage vows on a knight adventure cruise, but they land on a knitter cruise; Mr. Bickles holds a talent contest, and everyone goes on, except Timmy.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: When Poof comes home for spring break, Chloe gets to baby-sit him while Cosmo and Wanda go out for dinner.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Después de ganar cupones para un restaurante francés y elegante, Helga intenta demostrarle a Arnold que ella es más sofisticada que Lila. Helga está devastada cuando su amiga, Phoebe, se salta al sexto grado.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: La pandilla todos deciden que van hacerle una broma al Principal Wartz. Arnold piensa que es una mala idea, pero termina siendo atrapado y tomándose la culpa. Olga llega a PS 118 para ser una maestra estudiante.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Sid se mete en líos cuando negocia con el prestamista local, Gran Gino. El hermano mayor de Gerald, Jamie O, se enamora de una chica y de repente se vuelve amable con su hermano menor.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá está deprimido porque todo el mundo piensa que es aburrido. Timmy desea que la vida de Papá sea como una película de acción. / Timmy y sus padres son invitados a un country club. Cosmo pelea con una ardilla.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá se niega a vender a Sparky a su jefe y esto hace que el jefe le haga la vida miserable en el trabajo. Timmy y Sparky traman un plan. /Timmy desearía que sus antepasados hubieran elegido diferentes carreras.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy, su padre, y las hadas se atascan en un juego de mesa creado por Cosmo. / Timmy desea que Sparky tenga la oportunidad de ser un héroe. Papá piensa que puede hablar con los animales.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá y Crocker hacen un trato. Como resultado, Crocker se convierte en el mejor amigo de Dinkleberg. / Timmy desea hasta 5000 Timmys para el planeta de los papás. Los Timmys secuestran a Cosmo y Wanda.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker intenta desencadenar a Sparky con una palabra secreta. / SuperGato confunde a Sparky con su viejo archienemigo SuperPerro.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá organiza un programa de vigilancia vecinal para atrapar a un ladrón de barrio. / Timmy desearía tener la familia perfecta con el fin de ganar un concurso. Todo el mundo se vuelve loco tratando de ser perfecto.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Amor al primer ladrido / Desesperados sin amas de casa Papá prohíbe a Sparky de salir con la perrita de Dinkleberg. Timmy desea que a Papá le guste la perrita tanto como a Sparky.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Utilizando el ADN de Timmy, Crocker se hace pasar por Timmy del futuro. / Cosmo pierde su varita y Timmy y sus amigos deben ayudar a encontrarla.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: (Especial de media hora) Finalmente Poof se convierte en un padrino mágico. Es una desgracia para la Sra. Crocker.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cosmo y Wanda llevan a Timmy en un viaje a través del tiempo para conocer a algunos de sus apadrinados del pasado. Pero las cosas toman un giro para lo peor cuando Timmy interactúa con el pasado y altera el futuro!

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando Jorgen descubre que Cosmo nunca se graduó de la “Academia de magia”, lo amenaza con quitarle su trabajo como padrino mágico. Para resolver el misterio de lo que sucedió.

programme.desc: Sanji learns the truth about Zoro's amazing sacrifice, and Brook is overjoyed to learn that Laboon is still alive and doing fine!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback reveals the story of how Laboon and Brook became friends – and the promise that was made at the hour of their sorrowful parting of the ways.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook remembers the painful loss of his beloved captain, the tragic end to his musical pirate crew, and his lonely days as a skeleton adrift in the shadows.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook officially signs on as the newest member of the Straw Hats, and Luffy learns that his brother Ace may be in some serious trouble.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats encounter two young girls who are looking for their father, and Luffy has another run in with the devious Captain Foxy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats attempt to destroy a floating resort in order to reunite two sisters who possess a blueprint for making jewels!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook struggles to adjust to life among living after so many years alone in the darkness. Can the Straw Hats survive his chaotic attempts to fit in?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After surviving a terrible storm to reach the entrance to the Red Line, Luffy slugs a mysterious sea monster and Sanji may finally get to meet a mermaid!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats agree to help a mermaid rescue her friend, but the mission gets dangerous when a gang of flying fish dive bomb their boat!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats agree to join Camie's rescue mission, but her captured friend turns out to be a dangerous enemy from the past!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats wage a death-defying battle with a group of flying fish, and Luffy is shocked by the familiar face of their latest enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji squares off against his lookalike, Camie shows off just how fast a mermaid can swim, and Luffy defeats a giant bull without even landing a blow!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After their showdown with Duval, Luffy and the Straw Hats enjoy a hearty meal before proceeding to the site of their next adventure – an island bursting with bubbles!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stop at an island overflowing with bubbles to get their ship modified for underwater travel, but it's not long before they stumble upon an outrageous explosion and attract unwanted attention.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shakky explains why Sabaody Archipelago seems to be crawling with bounty hunters – eleven of the Grand Line's most wanted pirates are currently ashore and two of them are in Luffy's crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger keeps Zoro from tangling with a powerful Celestial Dragon, and Chopper goes bonkers when Camie disappears from the amusement park.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Camie was abducted by a dastardly gang of kidnappers, and her next stop is the auction house unless the Straw Hats can rescue her. To make it in time, they'll have to hitch a ride on some flying fish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With a little help from their fishy mates, the Straw Hats make it to the auction house in time to save Camie, but explosive elements prevent them from taking her back by force. Luckily, Nami's concocted a very generous plan!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami's plan to save Camie goes belly up when a snot-nosed Celestial Dragon outbids the Straw Hats. Luffy and Zoro make an explosive arrival at the auction house and promptly open up a deadly can of worms.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy turns a mermaid auction into a pirate-style brawl when he knocks the snot out of a Celestial Dragon. With a fleet of marines out to get them, the Straw Hats will have to fight their way off the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: They saved Camie from the auction block, but now the Straw Hats are surrounded by a fleet of marines. Lucky for Luffy, Eustass "Captain" Kidd and Trafalgar Law are ready to join the fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats join forces with Kidd's crew and Trafalgar's mates to make short work of the marines, but they're in for a surprise when they encounter a Warlord of the Sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew duck the marines by hiding out at Rayleigh's house. While Chopper tends to Hachi, Rayleigh entertains the Straw Hats with tales of his days as first mate on Gold Roger's ship.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Admiral Kizaru has arrived to lead the marines on a mission to wipe out all pirates. Meanwhile, Luffy and his crew prepare for a deadly battle with one of the Warlords of the Sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A groovy pirate belts out a tune that leaves Kizaru in pieces, but the admiral pulls himself together in time for a crushing Light Speed Kick. Luffy and Sanji try to protect the injured Zoro from a Warlord lookalike.

programme.desc: Mike and Frank visit a New York collector who's filled a train station with vintage cars, and although the cars are hot, the prices cool their engines. But the pick isn't as good as it looks until Mike finds a mysterious Italian trunk.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go to the Manga Artist's House, Part 1
programme.desc: Koichi and Hazamada visit the home of Rohan Kishibe, a popular manga artist whom they are huge fans of. Much to their joy, Rohan not only agrees to sign autographs but also invites them to take a tour of his workspace.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go to the Manga Artist's House, Part 2
programme.desc: Koichi is drawn back to Rohan’s house, where he sees the manga artist finishing up his next manga at an incredible speed. Rohan uses his stand Heaven’s Door on Koichi again to gain further creative inspiration from the young boy’s life experience.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go Hunting!
programme.desc: Jotaro and Josuke must hunt down a rat that is believed to have become a Stand user after being shot by the bow and arrow. When the two arrive at the site, they find dozens of dead rats killed in the most bizarre fashion.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Rohan Kishibe's Adventure
programme.desc: Koichi and Rohan discover a small alley that does not appear to be listed anywhere on the map. The two decide to go into the alley to see where it leads but soon find themselves walking around in circles and unable to get out.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shigechi's Harvest, Part 1
programme.desc: Josuke and Okuyasu become friends with a Stand user named Shigekiyo Yangu, a.k.a. Shigechi, who can use his Stand to find and collect the money that is scattered across town. Impressed by the boy’s abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shigechi's Harvest, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and friends try to cash in the winning lottery ticket they found. However, the bank clerk is not convinced they’re the actual owners of the ticket, placing the three teens into a tough spot as they try to talk their way through their big lie.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Dreams of Cinderella
programme.desc: Yukako, depressed because she can’t get Koichi to return her feelings, comes across a beauty salon where the owner claims a special beauty treatment will help customers find love and happiness…

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yoshikage Kira Just Wants to Live Quietly, Part 1
programme.desc: A man named Yoshikage Kira is enjoying his lunch break at the park with a sandwich in hand. But his peaceful afternoon is cut short when Shigechi accidentally takes Kira’s sandwich bag, believing it to be his own.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yoshikage Kira Just Wants to Live Quietly, Part 2
programme.desc: Yoshikage Kira is revealed to be the serial killer who’s been lurking in Morioh, and a Stand user as well. Having discovered his secret, Shigechi tries to fight off Kira with his Harvest, only to suffer fatal wounds from the killer’s Stand, Deadly Queen

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Attack, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and Koichi come under the attack of Yoshikage Kira’s Stand bomb, called Heart Attack. Narrowly escaping the blast, Koichi tries to go after the serial killer but is stopped by Jotaro, who tells him to focus on dealing with the Stand bomb first.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Attack, Part 2
programme.desc: Kira is forced to appear before Koichi after his remote Heart Attack bomb is made useless by the boy’s new Stand, Reverb Act 3. Finally coming face-to-face with the serial killer, Koichi attacks him with Act 3.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Father
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends are at Yoshikage Kira’s home trying to find any clues that may lead them to the serial killer, who has gone into hiding under a new face and identity.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Janken Boy Is Coming!
programme.desc: Kira’s father, Yoshihiro, begins searching for Stand users who would help protect his son from his pursuers. Meanwhile, Rohan is taking photos at the train station when he is suddenly challenged to a game of rock-paper-scissors.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: I'm an Alien
programme.desc: While on their way to school, Josuke and Okuyasu find a young man lying unconscious in the middle of what appears to be a crop circle. When they try to take a closer look, the man suddenly wakes up and starts claiming he’s an alien from outer space.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Highway Go Go, Part 1
programme.desc: Rohan is convinced that Josuke is cheating in their game of Cee-lo when all the dice rolls in his opponent’s favor. Feeling insulted, Rohan stabs his own finger and swear he’ll find out how Josuke is cheating in their next round.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Highway Go Go, Part 2
programme.desc: Rohan sacrifices himself to save Josuke from a remote-controlled Stand that sucks nutrients out of its victims. Moved by Rohan’s act of bravery, Josuke races through town to find and defeat the Stand’s user before it can kill Rohan.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Cats Love Yoshikage Kira
programme.desc: Shinobu tells her husband, Kosaku, that she saw a stray cat in their basement with a hole in its throat. When Kosaku goes down to take a look, he finds the cat already dead, The next morning, a strange plant sprouts from the spot where the cat was buried.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 1
programme.desc: Yoshihiro Kira spots Kosaku Kawajiri and instantly recognizes that it’s actually his son, Yoshikage. Meanwhile, Josuke, Okuyasu, and Mikitaka find a strange man living in an abandoned electrical tower.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke enters the electrical tower again to save Mikitaka and defeat Toyohiro Kanedaichi. Meanwhile, Rohan receives a visit from a first-class architect named Masazo Kinoto, who’s come to estimate the repair costs to his burnt house.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 3
programme.desc: Rohan finds himself possessed by Masazo Kinoto’s Stand, Cheap Trap, who tells the manga artist to burn the photos he took of the people in Morioh. Meanwhile, Josuke and Yuya encounter the Stand user responsible for Koichi’s disappearance.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 4
programme.desc: Rohan calls over Koichi to help him fight off Cheap Trap, which has attached itself onto Rohan’s back. Unfortunately, Koichi thinks Rohan is pulling a prank on him and leaves.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bites the Dust, Part 1
programme.desc: Kosaku Kawajiri is forced to kill Hayato after the boy threatens to expose him as a killer. To make matter worse, Kosaku learns from his father, Yoshihiro, that Rohan and the others are coming to investigate the Kawajiri family shortly.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bites the Dust, Part 2
programme.desc: Yoshikage Kira gains a new ability called Bites the Dust, a bomb that automatically kills anyone who tries to discover Kira’s identity through Hayato. Realizing that the only people who could stop Kira are ones with similar powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shining D (Diamond) is Unbreakable, Part 1
programme.desc: Hayato’s attempt to kill Kira using Stray Cat’s air bullet ends in failure. Kira realizes that letting Hayato repeat the same morning is becoming a risk, so he decides to undo Bites the Dust after he sees through Rohan’s death.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shining D (Diamond) is Unbreakable, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and Hayato hide inside a nearby residence to escape from Deadly Queen and Stray Cat’s attack. But to their horror, Kira is somehow able to close in on them from outside the house.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Con Pueblo Paleta en sus mentes, los chicos buscan un ferry, pero el puerto está abandonado... ¡excepto por unos Electrode explosivos! ¿Podrá Ash detener al Equipo Rocket antes de que el transbordador se llene de humo?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash tiene un ajetreado regreso a casa con una sorpresiva visita de un viejo amigo, una visita para ver al Profesor Oak, y un ataque del Equipo Rocket. ¡No hay lugar como el hogar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Luego de que Gary llega al rescate contra el Equipo Rocket, Ash aprovecha la oportunidad… Por fin, nuestro héroe reta a su rival a su primera batalla Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash comienza su viaje por Johto, una región ampliamente inexplorada y poblada por Pokémon nuevos para él y sus amigos.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: De nuevo de viaje, Ash y su Charizard derrotan por completo a una ambiciosa Entrenadora novata llamada Casey. Molesta, huye antes de que Ash pueda consolarla: ¡El momento perfecto para que el Equipo Rocket ataque!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En un bosque que está siendo destruido por un furioso Pinsir, Ash debe enlistar la ayuda del Heracross local para proteger su hogar. Pero resulta que estos Pokémon se ven más rudos de lo que actúan…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia Ciudad Violeta , nuestros héroes llegan a un valle donde los Donphan suelen cosechar sus preciosas piedras. No hace falta decir que los villanos del Equipo Rocket no están lejos de ellos.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El bosque puede ser un lugar temible por la noche, ¡especialmente si estás perdido! Nuestros héroes necesitarán algo de ayuda para salir de este embrollo. ¡Hoothoot, al rescate!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su primera parada en una ciudad desde Pueblo New Bark, nuestros héroes deciden ayudar a que la compañía de baile de un inseguro Bellossom recupere la confianza y participe en su próxima exhibición.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos llegan a un pueblo acechado por crímenes que imitan a un legendario ladrón maestro. La esperanza del pueblo yace en estos jóvenes Entrenadores... ¿Detendrán a este dúo criminal y a su Meowth cómplice?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando nuestros héroes devuelven a un infeliz Snubbull a su acaudalada Entrenadora, inicia una serie de eventos que cambiarán por siempre la vida del Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Brock descubre a un Stantler herido y asustado en un parque cercano, decide cuidarlo hasta curarlo. Pero con Jessie, James y Meowth tras ellos, ¿podrá mantener al Stantler a salvo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Aún en camino hacia Ciudad Violeta, Ash se encuentra con un Chikorita salvaje y trata de atraparlo. Chikorita demuestra ser un oponente más duro de lo que pensaba, y las cosas sólo empeoran con la llegada del Equipo Rocket…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El encargo del Profesor Oak de entregar la misteriosa Bola GS a un experto en Pokébolas es interrumpido cuando un Quagsire que gusta de los objetos redondos roba la Bola GS para un ritual nocturno…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Llegando por fin a Ciudad Violeta, la búsqueda del Gimnasio de Ash es frenada por un viaje a la Academia Pokémon local. Ash interpreta bien su papel de maestro, ¡hasta que un alumno huye con Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash escucha de un lugar de entrenamiento para Charizard salvajes y decide que es el lugar para perfeccionar la fuerza de su Charizard. Pero las duras lecciones a aprender cambiarán la amistad de Ash y Charizard para siempre.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El éxtasis y la agonía. Víctima de puñalada psico desnuda. Árbol en el cuello.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una pila de paneles de yeso se derrumba sobre un niño de 12 años. Cuando una mujer griega se queja de dolor abdominal, la Dra. Angelique Campen está decidida a descubrir la causa, a pesar de que otros médicos no han encontrado nada.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La sala de emergencias se convierte en un lugar peligroso cuando se encuentran drogas de contrabando en el vientre de un paciente; un médico está desconcertado por múltiples ataques cardíacos en una familia.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre adulto grita sin cesar sin razón, una madre joven está alerta pero helada, y un niño parece tener una sobredosis de drogas, pero lo niega.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico de emergencias fuera de servicio diagnostica su propia enfermedad crítica mientras se dirige al hospital.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer que inhaló gases tóxicos ahora cree que sus vecinos quieren matarla; un hombre está al borde de la muerte después de que una flecha le atraviese el pecho y corte los cables de su marcapasos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El lifting de una mujer sale terriblemente mal; el repentino cambio de personalidad del capellán de un hospital desconcierta al personal de urgencias; los síntomas de una mujer embarazada que ponen en peligro su vida necesitan un tratamiento urgente.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre piensa que está estreñido, pero su condición es potencialmente mortal; un médico que trata a una mujer con un paro cardíaco descubre que está tratando a dos pacientes en uno; y la familia del paciente no tiene ni idea.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico lucha con la decisión de revivir a un paciente mayor después de un RCP prolongado.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un joven adolescente pierde el control de sus brazos y piernas en una pijamada y tiene que ser tratado en la sala de emergencias; una mujer recibe un tiro en la pierna en su propia fiesta de despedida de soltera.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a very advanced bio-engineered warrior endowed with super strength, created by Anubis. While the team sets out to locate the origin of this new foe, Daniel travels to South America in search of a device left on Earth by the Ancients.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Having found the location of the warrior base, Carter is assigned a recon mission to determine Anubis's plans. Meanwhile, O'Neill mounts a mission to South America to rescue Daniel who has been kidnapped by Honduran rebels demanding a ransom.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: Detective Virgil Tibbs and Chief Bill Gillespie investigate a murder of a father of two very different daughters who are caught up in a case of intense sibling rivalry...one that may have led one or both of them to murder.

programme.desc: Tensions run high in the police department and in Sparta when Bubba is accused of attacking a black woman. And when a second woman comes forward from Bubba's past with similar claims, Virgil steps in to try and help clear his name.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.desc: The boys attempt to prove that cars can be art by taking over an entire art gallery in Middlesbrough.

programme.title: Isaac Dogboe vs Adam Lopez
programme.desc: On June 19th, 2021 Issac Dogboe faced Adam Lopez in a 10 round bout for the North American Boxing Federation Featherweight title that ended in a majority decision victory for Dogboe.

programme.title: Isaac Dogboe vs Jessie Magdaleno
programme.desc: On April 28th, 2018, Isaac Dogboe and Jessie Magdaleno fought at the Liacouras Center in Philadelphia. With Dogboe going down in round one and Magdaleno down in round five and twice in round 11, Dogboe took the victory.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Carl Frampton
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2021 Jamel Herring fought Carl Frampton for WBO World Super Featherweight title in a 12 round bout at the Caesars Palace Dubai resulting in a technical knockout victory in the sixth round for Herring.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Masayuki Ito
programme.desc: On May 25th, 2019 Jamel Herring and Masayuki Ito battled for the WBO super featherweight title in a 12 round bout at Osceola Heritage Park in Kissimmee, Fl. That ended in a unanimous decision victory for Herring.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Shakur Stevenson
programme.desc: On October 23rd, 2021, Shakur Stevenson fought Jamel Herring for the WBO World Super Featherweight Title at State Farm Arena in Atlanta. A much quicker Shakur dominated from the start, finishing Herring in the tenth round.

programme.title: James Toney vs Charles Williams
programme.desc: On July 29th, 1994 James Toney and Charles Williams battled eachother for IBF World Super Middleweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a knockout victory for James Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Dave Tiberi
programme.desc: On February 8th, 1992 James Toney faced Dave Tiberi for the IBF World Middleweight at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic City with a point deducted from Tiberi for a low blow the bout ended in a split decision win for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Freddie Delgado
programme.desc: On June 18th, 1995 James Toney fought Freddie Delgado at the Performing Arts Theater in New Orleans with the bout ending in the fifth round technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Iran Barkley
programme.desc: On February 13th, 1993 James Toney faced Iran Barkley in a thrilling bout at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas for IBF World Super middleweight title with Toney securing the title and victory.

programme.title: James Toney vs Michael Nunn
programme.desc: On May 10th, 1991 James Toney fought Michael Nunn at the John O'Donnell Stadium in Davenport for IBF World middleweight titles with the bout ending in round 11 by technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 1
programme.desc: On December 13th, 1991 James Toney and Mike McCallum fought eachother for the first time at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City for IBF World Middleweight title ending in a draw.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 2
programme.desc: On August 29th, 1992, James Toney rematched Mike McCallum for the IBF Middleweight Title in Reno. This time, Toney came out on top via a majority decision in which many believed the scorecards were too lopsided in favor of Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 3
programme.desc: On February 22nd, 1997 James Toney and Mike McCallum face each other for the final time at the Mohegan Sun Casino in Uncasville in a strong bout that lasted 12 rounds ending in a victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Tim Littles
programme.desc: On March 5th, 1994 James Toney and Tim Littles fought at the Olympic Auditorium in Los Angeles for IBF World Super middleweight titles resulting in a technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Janibek Alimkhanuly fought Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam in a middleweight championship bout at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. Janibek was dominant from the start, scoring a knockdown in round three and stopping N'Jikam in round eight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: For some time now, peace, rather than fighting, has been the way of life for Sandstorm and several refugee Autobots – but their way of life and their planet Paradron are suddenly threatened by an invasion of Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While fighting the Autobots, Galvatron loses his temper and unleashes his fury against his own troops. After the Autobots score a huge victory, dissension brews among the Decepticons whether Galvatron is really fit to lead them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Starscream is back, and this time he's in Scourge's body! Desperate to get his old body back, Starscream cuts a deal with the head of Unicron, who agrees to help him – if the Decepticon can accomplish three tasks…

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Quintessons fool Galvatron into releasing the vampiric Dweller from the dark core of Cybertron. The Autobots must stop the Dweller before it turns all the Transformers into zombie-like creatures and reduces Cybertron to a powerless, dead world.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Quintessons invent a machine which turns a human's worst nightmares into real-life creatures, capable of destroying both the Autobots and the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Quintessons invent a machine which turns a human's worst nightmares into real-life creatures, capable of destroying both the Autobots and the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots attempt to bring about a much-needed peace between two alien races – but the key to their success lies in another Quintesson journal, which contains secrets the Quintessons are determined not to share.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Quintessons will do anything to recover an ancient journal that's hidden on Junkion. When the Junkions refuse to hand it over, the Quintessons resort to subliminal tricks which cause galactic chaos.

programme.desc: An accident causes the Dinobot Grimlock to become a super genius – and the Autobot's only hope for stopping the Decepticon's latest scheme.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While maintaining law and order on earth, the Technobots encounter a conniving smuggler who claims the Quintessons stole a dangerous machine he was trying to sell. Is he telling them the truth – or leading the Technobots into a trap?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Dinobots, Predacons, and Terrorcons suddenly desert their fellow Transformers in the midst of a life and death struggle to defeat a more dangerous, energy-draining enemy who threatens the existence of all creatures, good and bad.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Eager to destroy the Transformers, scientists infect them with a plague that will pit Autobots and Decepticons against their own kind. As it rapidly spreads to all creatures, Sky Lynx rushes to revive the only Transformer who can save them all.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As a hate plague rapidly spreads among robots and humans on Earth, a fallen leader must rise and reclaim the Matrix of Leadership from an infected Rodimus Prime in order to save the galaxy, Transformers, and all mankind.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While Optimus Prime tries to figure out where his team and the Cybertron plasma chamber key have gone, the Autobots on the planet Nebulos team up with a rebel group to defeat the evil Hive, who have enlisted help from the Decepticons to fight back.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. Using their robotic powers to hide in plain sight, the Autobots and Decepticons disguise themselves as Earth vehicles, and their war between good vs. evil continues as the Autobots try to stop the Decepticons from stealing Earth's resources.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. The Decepticons' ship to planet Cybertron is complete, and the odds are stacked against Optimus Prime, Bumblebee, Jazz and the others in the battle to stop them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons begin to siphon the Earth's heat from the Arctic Circle and temperatures worldwide begin to drop. But unknown to the Decepticons is what, or who, they are about to release from the ice.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Playing Defense
programme.desc: In order to set Yuma straight, Shark steals Yuma’s Key! Can Yuma find the courage to face Shark, or will Yuma’s fears leave him cowering for cover?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Counter Offensive: Part 1
programme.desc: Let’s get ready to duuuuuuuuel! Yuma steps into the ring with Alito, but can he dodge this Barian’s Battlin’ Boxers before they send him to the canvas for a ten count?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Counter Offensive: Part 2
programme.desc: It’s Round 2 of the heavyweight battle between Yuma and Alito! Can Yuma bob and weave his way around Alito’s attacks, or will this Barian’s fancy footwork finish him off for good?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Dual Duel: Part 1
programme.desc: Girag’s got revenge on his mind and Ray in his sights, but when Yuma steps in to save the day, the Ray Way steers Yuma off course!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Dual Duel: Part 2
programme.desc: Girag has Yuma and Ray in the palm of his hand, but will a secret that Ray has been keeping help our heroes escape the clutches of this Barian behemoth?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Darkness Dawns
programme.desc: Astral and Yuma face a challenge so daunting that they must turn to their biggest adversary for help!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: You Give Love A Bot Name
programme.desc: When Orbital 7 crashes into Lillybot, it’s love at first sensor! So when he discovers his beloved bot is in trouble, he motors to free her from her tormentor… Yuma!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Take a Chance
programme.desc: Shark’s trying to control Rio’s life and she’s not taking it anymore! Will this family feud turn into a feeding frenzy for Shark, or will Rio put her brother’s winning streak on ice?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: An Imperfect Couple: Part 1
programme.desc: The gang’s dressed up as their favorite monsters for the school’s fun fair, but when Anna crashes the festivities, the party ends for Yuma!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: An Imperfect Couple: Part 2
programme.desc: Being Anna’s boyfriend is a dangerous job, but when Anna’s teacher plays a Barian card, Yuma finds out just how dangerous it is!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Enter Vector
programme.desc: Yuma is confronted by an enemy from the past who casts a dark shadow on his future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Search for Shadows
programme.desc: Yuma embarks on a dangerous mission to rescue Ray from the evil clutches of Vector!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Shadows of Deception
programme.desc: The Barians are on the attack, and Yuma is ready to risk everything to rescue Ray! But when Vector reveals a terrifying truth, Yuma's dream of saving Ray turns into a nightmare!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sinister Shadows
programme.desc: Still reeling from Vector’s revelation that he and Ray Shadows are one and the same, Yuma looks to make Vector pay for all his lies! But with Astral learning of Yuma’s own deceptions, will Yuma have to face Vector alone?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Shadows End
programme.desc: All the cards are on the table! Can our heroes defeat the dark and dangerous Barians, or will they end up one card short?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Duel in Ruins: Part 1
programme.desc: An ancient Barian deity awakens to add a terrifying new twist to Barian World’s agenda against Astral!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Duel in Ruins: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma is put to the ultimate test when a Number Guardian traps his friends and forces him to battle for their freedom!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Dark Mist Rises: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma searches for the second Mythyrian Number and ends up finding an old nemesis who is out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Dark Mist Rises: Part 2
programme.desc: Every time Astral attacks, he puts Yuma’s life in danger, but if he doesn’t attack, he’s a goner himself! It’s a no-win situation in the cruelest duel yet!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Barian Vengeance: Part 1
programme.desc: Alito’s back in the ring to take down Yuma, but a fair fight isn’t in the cards when Alito has one of Yuma’s friends in his corner!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Barian Vengeance: Part 2
programme.desc: Nistro’s under Alito’s control, and it’s up to Yuma and Dextra to free him! Can this tag team duo bob and weave their way past Alito’s attacks, or will this Barian knock out any chances they have of winning?

programme.desc: Kite faces his toughest challenge ever when a powerful Number Guardian threatens to take possession of his Galaxy-Eyes!

programme.desc: After an ancient statue is unearthed, Yuma finds himself between a rock and a furry place when he discovers that there’s more to Girag than meets the eye – like a red nose and whiskers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Sea of Troubles: Part 1
programme.desc: It’s rough waters ahead for Yuma and his friends when the search for the last two Mythyrian Numbers leads them to an ancient ruin that lies beneath the bottom of the ocean!

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Goes Platinum
programme.desc: Tori wins a contest to sing the opening number at a big music awards show, but the producer wants to totally change her look and behavior. Tori agrees, but finds that she doesn't like her new image.

programme.title: Victorious: Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: Victorious: The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Victorious: Stage Fighting
programme.desc: Tori has to defend herself after Jade claims Tori hurt her in a stage fighting exercise. Meanwhile, Trina has to fend off Robbie's advances when he thinks their stage kiss meant something.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry, and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly learns that because of her web show she's been given the opportunity for a full scholarship to the elite private school, Briarwood. Carly's not so sure about it, but Sam and Freddie know they have to change her mind.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie's in need of some guy time, so he tags along with Spencer to go fencing. Freddie's a natural, but things get complicated when Spencer gets him involved in a match with the amazing Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When their friend Gibby is too shy to ask out the girl he likes, the gang decides to make him and his crush contestants in an 'iWin A Date' segment on the web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Mrs. Ackerman, the gang's teacher, goes through a rough breakup with her boyfriend, causing her to quarrel with her students. A visit from Spencer to sort out the dispute turns into a date.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iSaw Him First: When Carly and Sam show interest in the same boy, they vow to not let him come between them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iOwe You: Sam is insulted when Freddie accuses her of not paying him and Carly back any of the money she's constantly borrowing.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iHurt Lewbert: A "Messing With Lewbert" sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly's obnoxious doorman.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iPie: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Spencer accidentally sets fire to Carly's presents, she wishes that she had a normal brother. A Christmas angel shows Carly what her life would be like.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iKiss: Sam overhears Freddie confess to Carly that he's never kissed a girl, then exposes his secret on the webshow. Gibby and Carly train Spencer for a tryout with the local professional football team.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iGive Away a Car: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iMeet Fred: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie offend an internet video sensation named Fred, he tries to convince his viewers to never watch iCarly again.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iLook Alike: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they're still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iGo Nuclear: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie get an assignment at school to create an original project that benefits the environment, Carly ends up building an illegal nuclear-powered generator!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie urge the iCarly fans to vote David Archuleta to victory on America Sings, they feel bad for the runner-up and help him make a music video. Meanwhile, Sam teaches Spencer how to lie like a pro.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly's old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly's best friend.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie lose the iCarly URL to Nevel, he demands Carly kiss him if she wants their URL back. Meanwhile, Spencer has fun with the two hundred pillows he accidentally ordered.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam and Freddie both win a contest for the best locker in school, they are forced to share the same locker. Meanwhile, Carly asks Spencer to give her art lessons.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie present iCarly Awards for best user-generated content, giving the awards to the winners live on the web show. Spencer enlists European swimsuit models to help him make the awards statuettes.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Cat is devastated when a cable network cancels a TV show about a family of cross-dressers.
